title: chrysanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides
intro: Chrysanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides, also known as a subspecies of the Chrysanthemum coronopifolium, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
